response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development, but lacks direct C++ development on Windows systems or domain expertise in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking. Their background is heavily skewed toward web/mobile development (Node.js, TypeScript) and other languages (D, Java, Python), with no clear evidence of SQL Server/Oracle usage or financial-domain experience.
strengths: Strong software engineering fundamentals with 15+ years of diverse development experience
Proven ability to lead and mentor teams (e.g., Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos)
Experience with low-latency systems (DLang at Dunnhumby) and CI/CD practices
concerns: No demonstrated C++ experience on Windows platform (primary requirement)
No evidence of SQL Server or Oracle database management (mandatory skill)
Lacks domain expertise in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking
